text: AlphaGeometry (Trinh et al. 2024, DeepMind, Nature) combines a neural language model with a symbolic deduction engine to solve Olympiad-level geometry problems, demonstrating the power of neurosymbolic approaches.

Neurosymbolic AI integrates neural learning with symbolic reasoning, combining the pattern recognition strengths of deep learning with the interpretability and systematic generalization of symbolic AI.

DeepMind's AlphaProof combined AlphaZero with formal mathematics to achieve silver-medal level at the 2024 International Mathematical Olympiad, solving 4/6 problems including the hardest geometry and number theory problems.
